meta.title: Online BCA in Applied Data Engineering with Career Support
meta.description: Build a strong foundation in big data systems with the BCA in Applied Data Engineering program. Learn data pipelines, cloud tools, and automation with live projects.

@graph.name: BCA in Applied Data Engineering
@graph.description: Explore the BCA in Applied Data Engineering program at Teksversity. Learn Python, SQL, data pipelines, cloud computing, machine learning, and data visualization with hands-on projects and expert mentorship.

mainEntity.name: What is BCA in Applied Data Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BCA in Applied Data Engineering is an undergraduate program that blends computer applications with data science and analytics. It focuses on programming, database management, and data engineering techniques to analyze and process large-scale datasets for modern business solutions.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration and structure of the BCA in Applied Data Engineering course?

acceptedAnswer.text: The program is a three-year undergraduate degree, divided into six semesters. Each semester covers core computer science concepts, data management techniques, analytics tools, and practical lab sessions for real-world learning.

mainEntity.name: What are the main objectives of the BCA in Applied Data Engineering program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course aims to build strong technical and analytical skills in students. It focuses on data collection, processing, visualization, and machine learning, helping learners become industry-ready professionals in data-driven domains.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in the BCA Applied Data Engineering syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key subjects include Programming in Python, Data Structures, Database Management Systems, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Big Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, and Data Visualization Tools.

mainEntity.name: What skills will I develop through this program?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students gain hands-on expertise in programming, data modeling, statistical analysis, database design, and data visualization. They also learn tools like Tableau, Power BI, and Hadoop, making them job-ready for data-centric roles.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after completing BCA in Applied Data Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Data Engineers, Data Analysts, Database Developers, Cloud Data Architects, or Business Intelligence Analysts in IT, finance, and tech industries.

mainEntity.name: What makes this course different from a regular BCA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Unlike a traditional BCA focused mainly on software development, BCA in Applied Data Engineering emphasizes data pipelines, cloud platforms, analytics, and scalable data systems that power AI and business intelligence applications.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer internships or practical learning during the course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Teksversity provides internships, live projects, and real-world data case studies to help students apply classroom learning to real business and technology challenges.

mainEntity.name: Can I pursue higher studies after completing this BCA program?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. After graduation, students can go for MCA, MBA in Business Analytics, M.Sc. in Data Science, or PG Diplomas in AI, Cloud, and Big Data, depending on their career goals.

mainEntity.name: Why should I choose Teksversity for BCA in Applied Data Engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers an industry-focused curriculum, expert mentors, hands-on labs, and 100% placement assistance. The program bridges theory with real-world data applications, ensuring students graduate with both knowledge and employability skills.

heading: Overview of
BCA in Applied Data Engineering Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Turn Raw Data into Reliable Systems. Power the World of Analytics
overViewOfOnline.description: The Bachelor’s in Applied Data Engineering at Teksversity is crafted for learners who want to specialize in building and maintaining robust data systems. This online BCA in Data Engineering combines software development, cloud computing, and big data technologies to help students create end-to-end data solutions. Students gain expertise in data modeling, integration, automation, and real-time processing using tools like Hadoop, Apache Spark, and Kafka. The curriculum emphasizes both technical depth and applied practice, ensuring that graduates are ready for roles like Data Engineer, Cloud Engineer, ETL Developer, or Big Data Specialist.
keyPoints: Design and maintain large-scale data architectures.
Build efficient ETL pipelines for analytics workflows.
Implement data security and governance standards.
Work with modern data tools and cloud environments.
Apply engineering principles to real-world data problems.

heading: Why Choose BCA in Applied Data Engineering in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: At Teksversity, the BCA in Applied Data Engineering is designed with direct input from data professionals and tech experts. The program emphasizes applied learning combining theoretical knowledge with live simulations, case studies, and data projects.

description.firstDescription: Students work on real-time challenges from data integration to automation while learning the latest industry tools. Alongside academic training, the course also includes career coaching, placement assistance, and professional mentorship to prepare students for the competitive tech market.

description.secondDescription: With flexible online learning, lab access, and global exposure, Teksversity ensures every learner graduates as a job-ready data engineer equipped for tomorrow’s data infrastructure challenges.

heading: Key Highlights of
BCA in Applied Data Engineering Program

keyPoints: Real-world data pipeline and ETL projects
Training in Hadoop, Spark, and cloud tools
Industry case studies and problem-solving sessions
Dedicated mentor support and progress tracking
Recorded sessions for review and learning
Mock technical interviews and career guidance
Job placement in cloud and data roles
Ongoing career growth and skill mentorship
Guest sessions from data architects and engineers

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description: Access the BCA in Applied Data Engineering brochure from Teksversity to discover how this program equips you with the technical skills and practical expertise to design, manage, and optimize data systems for today’s digital enterprises. Learn how our curriculum integrates modern data tools, cloud platforms, and analytics workflows for real-world impact.
downloadOurCourseBrochure.subHeading: What You’ll Get in the Brochure:

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
